title: koeleria cristata var. pseudocristata
intro: Koeleria cristata var. pseudocristata, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. pseudocristata include treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as wounds and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial properties. Koeleria cristata var. pseudocristata can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its benefits and potential side effects.
